tima 2.10.1

    • 1 Gathering everything you need
    • 2 Preparing inputs
    • 3 Performing Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation
    • 4 Benchmarking Performance
  • Changelog

3 Performing Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation

Adriano Rutz

2024-08-11

Source: vignettes/articles/III-processing.Rmd
III-processing.Rmd

This vignette describes how Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation is performed. If you followed all previous steps successfully, this should be a piece of cake, you deserve it!

targets::tar_make(names = matches("ann_pre$"))
#> ✔ skipped target yaml_paths

#> ▶ dispatched target ann_pre
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:37.664242 Loading files ... 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:37.664389 ... components 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:37.666425 ... edges 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:37.668118 ... structure-organism pairs 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:44.056568 ... canopus 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:44.083867 ... formula 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:44.109496 ... annotations 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:45.871892 Got c("ISDB", "TIMA MS1") initial annotations 
#>  2024-08-11 21:47:45.871892 Got c(976, 284676) initial annotations 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:46.714126 Re-arranging annotations 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:48.672621 adding biological organism metadata 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:48.804543 performing taxonomically informed scoring 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:48.851273 filtering top  3  candidates and keeping only MS1 candidates with minimum 
#>  0  biological score 
#>  OR 0 chemical score 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:49.0849 adding "notClassified" 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.408931 calculating biological score at all levels ... 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.409147 ... domain 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.419618 ... kingdom 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.429243 ... phylum 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.438755 ... class 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.448845 ... order 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.463568 ... family 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.487408 ... tribe 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.503008 ... genus 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.577971 ... species 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.842496 ... varietas 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:50.853126 ... keeping best biological score 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:52.45438 ... calculating weighted biological score 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:53.395175 taxonomically informed scoring led to 
#>  44615 annotations reranked at the kingdom level, 
#>  44208 annotations reranked at the phylum level, 
#>  36422 annotations reranked at the class level, 
#>  10804 annotations reranked at the order level, 
#>  8898 annotations reranked at the family level, 
#>  1495 annotations reranked at the tribe level, 
#>  1200 annotations reranked at the genus level, 
#>  457 annotations reranked at the species level, 
#>  and 0 annotations reranked at the variety level. 
#>  WITHOUT TAKING CONSISTENCY SCORE INTO ACCOUNT! (for later predictions) 
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:53.534774 calculating chemical consistency
#>               features with at least 2 neighbors ... 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:53.629369 ... among all edges ... 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:53.62957 ... at the (classyfire) kingdom level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:53.688552 ... at the (NPC) pathway level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:53.814484 ... at the (classyfire) superclass level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:54.034174 ... at the (NPC) superclass level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:54.260468 ... at the (classyfire) class level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:54.585487 ... at the (NPC) class level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:55.112761 ... at the (classyfire) parent level 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:55.711119 splitting already computed predictions 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:56.418064 joining all except -1 together 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:58.380802 adding dummy consistency for features
#>               with less than 2 neighbors 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:58.425184 adding already computed predictions back 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.836059 calculating chemical score at all levels ... 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.836243 ... (classyfire) kingdom 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.841948 ... (NPC) pathway 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.850808 ... (classyfire) superclass 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.859488 ... (NPC) superclass 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.87966 ... (classyfire) class 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.904639 ... (NPC) class 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:47:59.965994 ... (classyfire) parent 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:00.030685 ... keeping best chemical score 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:00.54741 ... calculating weighted chemical score 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:01.248412 chemically informed scoring led to 
#>  27163 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) kingdom level, 
#>  18103 annotations reranked at the (NPC) pathway level, 
#>  14047 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) superclass level, 
#>  8439 annotations reranked at the (NPC) superclass level, 
#>  13986 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) class level, 
#>  8282 annotations reranked at the (NPC) class level, and 
#>  7965 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) parent level. 
#>  WITHOUT TAKING CONSISTENCY SCORE INTO ACCOUNT! 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:01.334296 Keeping high confidence candidates only... 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:01.340191 Removed 284502 low confidence candidates out of the 286553 total ones. 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:01.340572 2051 high confidence candidates remaining. 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:02.063512 adding initial metadata (RT, etc.) and simplifying columns 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:02.091598 adding references 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:03.655599 selecting columns to export 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:03.73292 adding consensus again to droped candidates 
#>  
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:05.931518 Exporting ... 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:05.936926 Directory data/processed/240811_214805_example created. 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:05.937042 ... path to used parameters is data/processed/240811_214805_example 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:05.956534 ... path to used parameters is data/processed/240811_214805_example 
#> 2024-08-11 21:48:05.973923 ... path to export is data/processed/240811_214805_example/example_results.tsv 
#> ● completed target ann_pre [28.357 seconds]
#> ▶ ended pipeline [36.466 seconds]
#>

The final exported file is formatted in order to be easily imported in Cytoscape to further explore your data!

We hope you enjoyed using TIMA and are pleased to hear from you!

For any remark or suggestion, please fill an issue or feel free to contact us directly.

On this page

Developed by Adriano Rutz.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.0.
